CAPD

Attendance, Alerts & Events for ISB

Mobile-first platform for 1000+ students across 4 cohorts

What is CAPD?

  • Attendance: Rotating 6-digit codes, changing every 45 seconds
  • Events: Full descriptions, event details, check-in available
  • Notifications: Push alerts for announcements and updates
  • Cohort Privacy: PGP Hyderabad, Mohali, YL Y1, YL Y2 — data stays private
  • Admin Controls: Manage events, attendance, notifications easily
Login Page
Login Form
Admin Events
Notifications
Attendance & Test
Attendance Dashboard
Events List
Alerts

Core Features

  • Secure Login: Institutional email + 6-digit PIN
  • Rotating Codes: Impossible to predict, 45-second rotation
  • Event Descriptions: Full details visible to students before attending
  • Attendance Tracking: Fast, secure, scalable
  • Push Notifications: Instant alerts for all or specific cohorts
  • Cohort Isolation: Database-level privacy enforcement

Built With Modern Tech

  • Frontend: Next.js 16, React 19, Tailwind CSS
  • Backend: Supabase (PostgreSQL), Server Actions
  • Auth: Supabase Auth + Row-Level Security
  • Notifications: OneSignal Web Push
  • Deployment: Vercel (auto-scaling)
  • Security: HTTPS, hashed passwords, encrypted data

Why CAPD Works

  • Purpose-built for ISB: Cohort isolation, bulk imports, institutional email
  • Mobile-first: Works on any device, installable as PWA
  • Admin-friendly: No coding needed for events, notifications, cohorts
  • Secure by default: RLS, hashed passwords, no exposed secrets
  • Scales to 1000+: Built on Supabase & Vercel infrastructure
  • Ready now: Core features live and tested

✓ Ready to Deploy

CAPD is built, tested, and ready for ISB

Students log in with their ISB email
Admins manage events, attendance & notifications
Data is private, secure, and backed up
